UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRANA ASSOCIATES FOURTEEN, A CALIF. LTD. PART. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLK, LAWRENCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 360 HYDE ST #504, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522. JUDGMENT INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER CCP 415.46.
